description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with lush, broad green leaves arranged in dense clusters atop several woody stems. The leaves are slightly elongated, with visible veins and a somewhat matte texture, showing a healthy, vibrant appearance. The plant is housed in a simple, dark-colored plastic pot filled with dark soil and some visible white perlite for drainage. The pot is cylindrical, tapering slightly towards the base, and has no visible decorative elements or patterns. The overall structure of the plant is bushy and well-balanced, with foliage extending outward in all directions, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. There are no visible plant identification tags or labels attached to the pot or plant.
description: A bushy green plant with broad leaves in a plain dark plastic pot, filled with soil and perlite. The plant has multiple woody stems and dense, healthy foliage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's dense foliage and the dark plastic pot, with leaves extending outward and some soil visible at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plant's broad leaf clusters and the pot's cylindrical shape, with more leaves visible on the left side.
description_view_2: From this angle, the lighter green hues of the leaves are more prominent, and the pot appears slightly lighter due to lighting.
description_view_3: This view shows the plant's woody stems more clearly and the pot's dark color, with foliage extending evenly around the plant.
